using RecipeHub.Models;

namespace RecipeHub.Services;

public class RecipeService
{
    private readonly List<Recipe> _recipes = new()
    {
        new Recipe { Id = 1, Title = "Classic Margherita Pizza", Category = "Italian", Ingredients = "Pizza dough
San Marzano tomatoes
Fresh mozzarella
Fresh basil
Olive oil
Salt", Steps = "1. Preheat oven to 475°F (245°C).
2. Roll out dough on a floured surface.
3. Spread crushed tomatoes evenly.
4. Tear mozzarella and distribute over sauce.
5. Bake for 10-12 minutes until crust is golden.
6. Top with fresh basil and a drizzle of olive oil.", AverageRating = 4.5, RatingCount = 12 },
        new Recipe { Id = 2, Title = "Chicken Tikka Masala", Category = "Indian", Ingredients = "Chicken breast
Yogurt
Garam masala
Turmeric
Cumin
Tomato sauce
Heavy cream
Garlic
Ginger
Onion", Steps = "1. Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices for 2 hours.
2. Grill or pan-fry chicken until charred.
3. Sauté onion, garlic, and ginger.
4. Add tomato sauce and spices, simmer 15 min.
5. Stir in cream, add chicken pieces.
6. Simmer 10 more minutes. Serve with rice.", AverageRating = 4.8, RatingCount = 20 },
        new Recipe { Id = 3, Title = "Beef Tacos", Category = "Mexican", Ingredients = "Ground beef
Taco shells
Lettuce
Tomato
Cheddar cheese
Sour cream
Taco seasoning
Onion", Steps = "1. Brown ground beef with diced onion.
2. Add taco seasoning and water, simmer 5 min.
3. Warm taco shells in oven.
4. Fill shells with beef mixture.
5. Top with lettuce, tomato, cheese, and sour cream.", AverageRating = 4.2, RatingCount = 8 },
        new Recipe { Id = 4, Title = "Pad Thai", Category = "Asian", Ingredients = "Rice noodles
Shrimp or tofu
Eggs
Bean sprouts
Green onions
Peanuts
Lime
Fish sauce
Tamarind paste
Sugar", Steps = "1. Soak rice noodles in warm water 30 min.
2. Stir-fry shrimp/tofu until cooked, set aside.
3. Scramble eggs in the wok.
4. Add noodles and sauce (tamarind, fish sauce, sugar).
5. Toss with bean sprouts and green onions.
6. Serve with crushed peanuts and lime wedge.", AverageRating = 4.6, RatingCount = 15 },
        new Recipe { Id = 5, Title = "Chocolate Lava Cake", Category = "Desserts", Ingredients = "Dark chocolate
Butter
Eggs
Sugar
Flour
Vanilla extract", Steps = "1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Melt chocolate and butter together.
3. Whisk eggs and sugar until thick.
4. Fold chocolate mixture into eggs.
5. Add flour and vanilla, mix gently.
6. Pour into greased ramekins.
7. Bake 12-14 minutes (center should be soft).", AverageRating = 4.9, RatingCount = 25 },
        new Recipe { Id = 6, Title = "Caesar Salad", Category = "Salads", Ingredients = "Romaine lettuce
Parmesan cheese
Croutons
Caesar dressing
Lemon juice
Garlic
Anchovy paste
Olive oil", Steps = "1. Wash and chop romaine lettuce.
2. Make dressing: whisk garlic, anchovy paste, lemon juice, and olive oil.
3. Toss lettuce with dressing.
4. Top with shaved Parmesan and croutons.
5. Serve immediately.", AverageRating = 4.0, RatingCount = 6 },
    };

    private readonly List<RecipeCategory> _categories = new()
    {
        new RecipeCategory { Name = "Italian", Description = "Classic pasta, pizza, and Mediterranean flavors", Icon = "🍝", RecipeCount = 1 },
        new RecipeCategory { Name = "Indian", Description = "Rich curries, aromatic spices, and vibrant dishes", Icon = "🍛", RecipeCount = 1 },
        new RecipeCategory { Name = "Mexican", Description = "Bold flavors with fresh salsas and grilled meats", Icon = "🌮", RecipeCount = 1 },
        new RecipeCategory { Name = "Asian", Description = "Stir-fries, noodles, and umami-rich cuisine", Icon = "🍜", RecipeCount = 1 },
        new RecipeCategory { Name = "Desserts", Description = "Sweet treats from cakes to pastries", Icon = "🍰", RecipeCount = 1 },
        new RecipeCategory { Name = "Salads", Description = "Fresh, healthy, and vibrant combinations", Icon = "🥗", RecipeCount = 1 },
    };

    public List<RecipeCategory> GetCategories() => _categories;

    public List<Recipe> GetRecipesByCategory(string category) =>
        _recipes.Where(r => r.Category.Equals(category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();

    public Recipe? GetRecipeById(int id) => _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);

    public List<Recipe> GetAllRecipes() => _recipes;

    public void AddRecipe(Recipe recipe)
    {
        recipe.Id = _recipes.Max(r => r.Id) + 1;
        _recipes.Add(recipe);

        var category = _categories.FirstOrDefault(c => c.Name.Equals(recipe.Category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
        if (category != null)
            category.RecipeCount++;
    }

    public void RateRecipe(int recipeId, int stars)
    {
        var recipe = _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == recipeId);
        if (recipe != null)
        {
            var totalStars = recipe.AverageRating * recipe.RatingCount;
            recipe.RatingCount++;
            recipe.AverageRating = (totalStars + stars) / recipe.RatingCount;
        }
    }
}

data.content:
The Blazor Web App is ready. Here's what was created:

**Project: `RecipeHub`** (Blazor Web App with Interactive Server mode)

**Structure:**
- **Homepage** (`/`) — Static SSR page showing 6 recipe categories with icons
- **Category page** (`/category/{name}`) — Lists recipes in a category (read-only)
- **Recipe detail** (`/recipe/{id}`) — Shows ingredients + steps with an interactive `StarRating` widget
- **Submit Recipe** (`/submit`) — Interactive form with title, category, ingredients, and steps fields
- **StarRating component** — Click-to-rate 1–5 stars with live average display

**Design decisions:**
- Only `StarRating` and `SubmitRecipe` use `@rendermode InteractiveServer` — everything else renders as static SSR
- `RecipeService` is registered as a singleton with seed data (6 recipes across 6 categories)
- Bootstrap styling throughout, responsive card layout

Run with `cd RecipeHub && dotnet run`.
